steps.title: Read the trend and intercept from the scatterplot
steps.content:
The points trend downward as $x$ increases — so the slope is negative.

That eliminates choices with positive slopes (A and C).

When $x = 0$, $y$ is around 8.7, and when $x$ grows, $y$ decreases gradually — a small (in absolute value) slope around $-0.8$, not a steep $-8.7$.

steps.title: Match the form $y = b + mx$
steps.content:
We need $y$-intercept $\approx 8.7$ and slope $\approx -0.8$:
$$y = 8.7 - 0.8x$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
